info.title: DamascusTransit API
info.description:
Real-time transit tracking and fleet management for Damascus, Syria.

## Authentication

Most read endpoints are public. Write and admin endpoints require a JWT bearer token.

1. **POST /api/auth/login** — exchange email/password for a token
2. Include the token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected endpoints

Roles: `admin` (full access) · `dispatcher` (fleet ops) · `driver` (own vehicle) · `viewer` (read-only)

Tokens expire after 24 hours.

get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns:
    Health status including database connectivity, Redis status,
    last position update timestamp, and active vehicle count.

post.description:
Authenticate user and return JWT token.

Args:
    request: Email and password credentials

Returns:
    JWT access token and user info

Raises:
    HTTPException: Invalid credentials or rate limited

get.description:
List all active routes with stop counts.

Returns:
    List of active routes

schema.title: Response List Routes Api Routes Get

get.description:
Get single route details with stops.

Args:
    route_id: Route UUID

Returns:
    Route details with associated stops

Raises:
    HTTPException: Route not found

List all active stops.

Returns:
    List of active stops

schema.title: Response List Stops Api Stops Get

get.description:
Find nearest stops using PostGIS RPC.

Args:
    lat: Latitude
    lon: Longitude
    radius: Search radius in meters (default 1000)
    limit: Maximum results (default 10)

Returns:
    Nearest stops sorted by distance

schema.title: Response Find Nearest Stops Api Stops Nearest Get

get.description:
List all active vehicles with latest positions.

Returns:
    List of active vehicles with real-time position data

schema.title: Response List Vehicles Api Vehicles Get

get.description:
Get latest vehicle positions only (lightweight endpoint).

Returns:
    Vehicle ID, location, and basic tracking data

schema.title: Response Get Vehicle Positions Api Vehicles Positions Get

get.description:
Server-sent events (SSE) stream of vehicle position updates.
Polls vehicle_positions_latest every 2 seconds for up to 25 seconds (Vercel limit).

Returns:
    Streaming response with position updates

Get fleet statistics and real-time metrics.

Returns:
    Fleet overview stats

schema.title: Response Get Fleet Stats Api Stats Get

get.description:
Get schedule for a route by day of week.

Args:
    route_id: Route UUID

Returns:
    Schedule entries for each day

schema.title: Response Get Route Schedule Api Schedules  Route Id  Get

get.description:
Get all unresolved alerts.

Returns:
    List of active alerts

schema.title: Response Get Active Alerts Api Alerts Active Get

post.description:
Report driver's current position.

Args:
    position: GPS coordinates, speed, heading
    current_user: Authenticated driver

Returns:
    Success confirmation

Start a new trip for the driver.

Args:
    trip: Route and optional scheduled start time
    current_user: Authenticated driver

Returns:
    Trip ID and confirmation

End the driver's current trip.

Args:
    trip_data: Final passenger count
    current_user: Authenticated driver

Returns:
    Success confirmation

Update passenger count for current trip.

Args:
    data: New passenger count
    current_user: Authenticated driver

Returns:
    Success confirmation

get.description:
List all users.

Args:
    current_user: Authenticated admin/dispatcher

Returns:
    List of users

schema.title: Response List Users Api Admin Users Get

post.description:
Create a new user (admin only).

Args:
    user_data: User details
    current_user: Authenticated admin

Returns:
    Created user

put.description:
Update user details.

Args:
    user_id: User UUID
    user_data: Fields to update
    current_user: Authenticated admin

Returns:
    Updated user

get.description:
List all vehicles including inactive ones.

Args:
    current_user: Authenticated admin/dispatcher

Returns:
    All vehicles

schema.title: Response List All Vehicles Api Admin Vehicles Get

post.description:
Create a new vehicle.

Args:
    vehicle_data: Vehicle details
    current_user: Authenticated admin

Returns:
    Created vehicle

put.description:
Update vehicle details.

Args:
    vehicle_id: Vehicle UUID
    vehicle_data: Fields to update
    current_user: Authenticated admin

Returns:
    Updated vehicle

post.description:
Assign vehicle to route and driver.

Args:
    vehicle_id: Vehicle UUID
    assignment: Route and driver IDs
    current_user: Authenticated admin/dispatcher

Returns:
    Success confirmation

get.description:
Get all alerts (resolved and unresolved).

Args:
    current_user: Authenticated admin/dispatcher

Returns:
    All alerts

schema.title: Response List All Alerts Api Admin Alerts Get

put.description:
Resolve or unresolve an alert.

Args:
    alert_id: Alert UUID
    alert_data: Resolved status
    current_user: Authenticated admin/dispatcher

Returns:
    Success confirmation

get.description:
List trips with optional filtering.

Args:
    vehicle_id: Filter by vehicle
    driver_id: Filter by driver
    status_filter: Filter by trip status
    current_user: Authenticated admin/dispatcher

Returns:
    List of trips

schema.title: Response List Trips Api Admin Trips Get

get.description:
Get fleet analytics overview for dashboard.

Args:
    current_user: Authenticated admin/dispatcher

Returns:
    Fleet analytics

Get fleet utilization over the last 24 hours, bucketed by hour.

Uses completed trips to infer active vehicle counts per hour.
Returns hourly active vs idle vehicle counts.

Get per-route performance: on-time %, average delay, and trip count
based on completed trips in the last 7 days.

Get driver scoreboard: trips completed and avg route adherence (on_time_pct)
based on completed trips in the last 30 days.

Get GPS position data for heatmap visualization.

Returns recent vehicle positions (last 24h) as GeoJSON FeatureCollection
suitable for MapLibre heatmap layer.

post.description:
Webhook for Traccar GPS position updates.
Secured by mandatory X-Traccar-Signature HMAC header.

Args:
    position: Position data from Traccar
    x_traccar_signature: HMAC-SHA256 signature (required)

Returns:
    Success confirmation

Webhook for Traccar events (engine on/off, speeding, etc).
Secured by mandatory X-Traccar-Signature HMAC header.

Args:
    event: Event data from Traccar
    x_traccar_signature: HMAC-SHA256 signature (required)

Returns:
    Success confirmation

get.description:
Serve individual GTFS static feed files.

Returns the raw CSV content of agency.txt, stops.txt, routes.txt,
trips.txt, stop_times.txt, calendar.txt, or feed_info.txt.

GTFS-Realtime VehiclePositions feed.

Returns a binary protobuf FeedMessage (GTFS-RT 2.0) with live vehicle
positions fetched from vehicle_positions_latest.  Consumers should set
Accept: application/x-protobuf or application/octet-stream.

Falls back to a minimal empty feed when the gtfs-realtime-bindings
package is not installed, returning JSON instead so the endpoint remains
useful in dev environments without the optional dependency.
Root endpoint - API documentation redirect.
